surface: M4 local usage read model hardening
noTouch: public operator HTTP endpoint without auth

checks.browser: skip: pure local usage read-model hardening and existing local smoke path only; no dashboard UI in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice hardens a pure in-memory read model and deterministic smoke assertions without adding durable storage, operator endpoints, dashboard UI, real IOTA network calls, Docker, sponsor keys, or secrets
knownFailures: Regression tests first failed because missing reason codes were not counted under unknown, maxRecentEvents: 0 retained events, literal unknown metadata collided with missing metadata, and prototype-like reason codes were not represented safely.
notes: Hardens the local usage read model for retention and grouping edge cases: maxRecentEvents: 0 disables recent event payload retention; missing reasons count under unknown; literal unknown app/wallet metadata is escaped to literal:unknown; dynamic reason-code counters safely handle prototype-like strings.
